questionHtml:
Deduce the molecular geometry of chloramine and estimate its H–N–H bond angle.

 

Molecular geometry:

H–N–H bond angle:
markschemeHtml:
Molecular geometry:
«trigonal» pyramidal  [✔]

H–N–H bond angle:
107°  [✔]

 

Note: Accept angles in the range of 100–109.
